summary: Made two surgical seam edits: reframed the opening paragraph to avoid echoing the next chapter's arrival-style construction while preserving the courthouse carryover from chapter 14, and clarified the closing road line to reinforce the handoff into the post-Larkin storm setup of chapter 16.
edits: Reworked the first paragraph so the chapter enters through courthouse atmosphere and waiting tension instead of a parallel 'Della ... before ...' opening scaffold.
Adjusted the final road paragraph to specify the ride home from Larkin, tightening the transition into chapter 16's storm-broken morning.
